STUB.title: Full Transcript: Stubhub Holdings Q1 2026 Earnings Call

macro_events.event_summary: Kevin Warsh appears poised to be confirmed as Fed Chair under Trump, with market speculation about whether he will deliver the dovish/accommodative policy Trump wants.
primary_drivers: Uncertainty over Fed independence and future rate path under new chair
Warsh's historically hawkish-on-inflation reputation conflicting with Trump's pressure for cuts
Potential weakening of USD if market prices in politicized dovish Fed
headlines: Analysis: Trump finally gets his man at the Fed. Will Kevin Warsh disappoint him?
